visual.background: Light-blue sky-like background with rounded white clouds.
visual.composition: Left-aligned text blocks balanced by a large megaphone illustration at lower right.
visual.layout: Small supporting line at upper left, oversized headline in center-left, blue rounded copy panel below, megaphone as focal object at right.
visual.typography: Large rounded uppercase blue and white display type with strong shadowing.

copy.headline: HIZLI KAZANÇ
copy.subheadline: TEK GEREKEN ŞEY BİR KRİPTO CÜZDANIDIR.
copy.language_quality: Turkish copy appears legible; financial and refund claims require compliance review.

marketing.audience: Turkish-speaking users with a crypto wallet, inferred from visible copy.
marketing.hook: Fast earnings wording combined with a deposit-refund claim.
marketing.value_proposition: The image presents fast earnings and deposit refunds to users with a crypto wallet.
claims_requiring_verification: Eligibility and material terms are not visible

strengths: High visual separation of headline and offer
weaknesses: Financial/refund wording creates material compliance risk
Megaphone competes with lower offer panel
test_ideas: Test a factual product explanation without earnings language
change: Remove or substantiate earnings and refund claims
Add material conditions in readable form

uncertainties: Deposit refund conditions are not shown
